when I run this it takes ages and it doesn't do anything -- can I get some insight into what its doing while its running?
Added a heartbeat spinner to the retopic LLM call in `src/doctor.rs` that prints elapsed time to stderr while waiting, so you can tell it's still thinking rather than stuck.
is it multistep? or does it literally take all that long in a single call? how many tokens do we send?
It's a single call sending only ~1,700 tokens; the delay is entirely model-side reasoning (chain-of-thought) and cloud queueing, not payload size.
